places.name: Bund Sightseeing Tunnel
places.description: This psychedelic tourist trap is a leisurely descent into madness.

places.name: Shanghai Propaganda Poster Art Centre
places.description: An collection of Chinese propaganda posters from 1949 to 1979.

places.name: Shimao Wonderland Intercontinental Hotel
places.description: The world's first hotel built in an abandoned water-filled quarry.

places.name: Shanghai's 1933 Slaughterhouse
places.description: Rivers of cattle blood gone, a strange Escheresque building remains, the last of its kind.

places.name: Oriental Pearl Tower
places.description: The once highest point in China blends symbolic design with a kick of adrenaline.

places.name: Shanghai Marriage Market
places.description: A son-and-daughter meat market, hawked by mom and dad.

places.name: Shanghai French Concession
places.description: An out-of-place slice of France, smack in the middle of Shanghai.

places.name: Peace Hotel Jazz Bar
places.description: This bar is home to what's likely the oldest living jazz band in the world.

places.name: Shanghart Supermarket
places.description: This supermarket in Shanghai appears to be a typical Chinese convenience store, but all of the bottles are empty and all the containers are filled with nothing but air.
